(born 9 October 1987) is a Pakistani television and film actress. She is best known for her role as *Emaan* in the Pakistani TV drama series *[Khuda Aur Muhabbat](/wiki/Khuda_Aur_Muhabbat "Khuda Aur Muhabbat"),* in [Season 1](/wiki/Khuda_Aur_Muhabbat_season_1 "Khuda Aur Muhabbat season 1") and [Season 2](/wiki/Khuda_Aur_Muhabbat_season_2 "Khuda Aur Muhabbat season 2") of the show.[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2) She also played the role of Maryam in TV One's *[Maryam Periera](/wiki/Maryam_Periera "Maryam Periera")* (2018).[[3]](#cite_note-3)

["Khuda Aur Mohabbat 3 will feature Feroze Khanand Iqra Aziz"](https://www.thenews.com.pk/magazine/instep-today/584188-khuda-aur-mohabbat-3-will-feature-feroze-khanand-iqra-aziz). *[The News International](/wiki/The_News_International "The News International")*. Retrieved 1 January 2021.

["Remember Sadia Khan From "Khuda aur Mohabbat"? [Pictures]"](https://propakistani.pk/lens/remember-sadia-khan-from-khuda-aur-mohabbatpictures/). *propakistani.pk*. 9 August 2019. Retrieved 1 January 2021.
Haider, Sadaf (7 November 2018). ["Review: Ahsan Khan is the only good thing about minority TV drama Maryam Pereira"](https://images.dawn.com/news/1181207). *Images*. Retrieved 30 April 2021.

NewsBytes. ["Sadia Khan may feature in a song alongside Akshay Kumar"](https://www.thenews.com.pk/magazine/instep-today/129255-Sadia-Khan-may-feature-in-a-song-alongside-Akshay-Kumar). *[The News International](/wiki/The_News_International "The News International")*. Retrieved 28 April 2019.

NewsBytes. ["Update: Sadia Khan on her Bollywood debut"](https://www.thenews.com.pk/magazine/instep-today/129554-Update-Sadia-Khan-on-her-Bollywood-debut). *[The News International](/wiki/The_News_International "The News International")*. Retrieved 28 April 2019.

Sarym, Ahmed (26 November 2016). ["Sadia Khan and Mikaal Zulfiqar's upcoming film will highlight the 1971 war"](http://images.dawn.com/news/1176647). *[DAWN](/wiki/Dawn_(newspaper) "Dawn (newspaper)")*. Retrieved 28 April 2019.

NewsBytes. ["Sadia Khan in talks for a Bollywood film"](https://www.thenews.com.pk/magazine/instep-today/276127-sadia-khan-in-talks-for-a-bollywood-film). *[The News International](/wiki/The_News_International "The News International")*. Retrieved 28 April 2019.

[The Express Tribune](/wiki/The_Express_Tribune "The Express Tribune") (2 December 2016). ["Film on East Pakistan debacle in works"](https://tribune.com.pk/story/1251605/film-east-pakistan-debacle-works/). *The Express Tribune*. Retrieved 28 April 2019.

Jawaid, Wajiha (16 October 2015). ["Sadia Khan's Mauritius adventure with Sami Khan"](https://web.archive.org/web/20190724093700/https://www.hipinpakistan.com/news/1148120). *HIP*. Archived from [the original](http://www.hipinpakistan.com/news/1148120) on 24 July 2019. Retrieved 28 April 2019.

NewsBytes. ["Sadia Khan and Uzair Jaswal come together for Shayad"](https://www.thenews.com.pk/magazine/instep-today/236926-Sadia-Khan-and-Uzair-Jaswal-come-together-for-Shayad). *The News*. Retrieved 28 April 2019.

**Sadia Khan** (born 9 October 1987) is a Pakistani television and film actress. She is best known for her role as *Emaan* in the Pakistani TV drama series *[Khuda Aur Muhabbat](/wiki/Khuda_Aur_Muhabbat "Khuda Aur Muhabbat"),* in [Season 1](/wiki/Khuda_Aur_Muhabbat_season_1 "Khuda Aur Muhabbat season 1") and [Season 2](/wiki/Khuda_Aur_Muhabbat_season_2 "Khuda Aur Muhabbat season 2") of the show.[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2) She also played the role of Maryam in TV One's *[Maryam Periera](/wiki/Maryam_Periera "Maryam Periera")* (2018).[[3]](#cite_note-3)

## Career

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Sadia_Khan&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Career")]

Khan is known for playing a variety of roles in a number of television serials including Eman in *[Khuda Aur Muhabbat](/wiki/Khuda_Aur_Muhabbat "Khuda Aur Muhabbat")* (2011), Naina Syed in *[Laa](/wiki/Laa_(TV_serial) "Laa (TV serial)")* (2014), Umm-e-Hani in *[Shayad](/wiki/Shayad "Shayad"),* (2017) and Maryam in *[Maryam Periera](/wiki/Maryam_Periera "Maryam Periera")* (2018). Khan also appeared in films *[Dunno Y2... Life Is a Moment](/wiki/Dunno_Y2..._Life_Is_a_Moment "Dunno Y2... Life Is a Moment")* (2015) *and [Abdullah: The Final Witness](/wiki/Abdullah:_The_Final_Witness "Abdullah: The Final Witness")* (2016).[[4]](#cite_note-4)[[5]](#cite_note-5)[[6]](#cite_note-6)[[7]](#cite_note-7)[[8]](#cite_note-8)
